title: Automation Engineer
description:
We’re seeking a skilled and driven Automation Engineer to design, develop, implement, and maintain automation solutions that streamline processes, boost efficiency, and enhance product quality.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, maintain, and enhance automation frameworks for software, hardware testing, and process optimization.
  • Collaborate with teams to gather requirements and deliver tailored automation solutions.
  • Develop efficient scripts, test cases, and reusable documentation for automation tasks.
  • Identify and implement opportunities to enhance operational efficiency.
  • Troubleshoot and upgrade existing automation systems to ensure optimal performance.
  • Stay informed on emerging technologies and integrate innovative practices.
  • Provide training and technical support on automation tools and processes.
  • Document workflows, test cases, and results for auditing and reference.
  • Coordinate project timelines and stakeholder meetings for seamless delivery.

Qualifications:

  • Experience: 4–7 years in automation engineering, with a focus on robotics and process automation.
  • Technical Skills: Proficiency in Linux, VBA, and other relevant programming languages.
  • Development Practices: Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and tools.
  • Problem-Solving: Strong analytical skills with keen attention to detail.
  • Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication, with the ability to work collaboratively in cross-functional teams.
  • Certifications: Certification in automation or related fields is advantageous.
  • Industry Background: Experience in logistics or manufacturing is a plus.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified / contacted.

EA Registration No.: R1658484, Amita Raj

Allegis Group Singapore Pte Ltd, Company Reg No. 200909448N, EA License No. 10C4544

ALLEGIS GROUP SINGAPORE PRIVATE LIMITED

Allegis Group is the global leader in talent solutions focused on working harder and caring more than any other provider. We’ll go further to understand the needs of our people – our clients, our candidates, and our employees – and to consistently deliver on our promise of an unsurpassed quality experience. That’s the Allegis Group difference, and it’s consistent across every Allegis Group company. With more than US$11billion in annual revenues and over 500 locations across the globe, our network provides businesses with a comprehensive suite of talent solutions — without sacrificing the niche expertise required to ensure a successful partnership. Our specialised group of companies includes: Aerotek, TEKsystems, Allegis Global Solutions, Aston Carter, Major, Lindsey & Africa, Allegis Partners, MarketSource, and EASi.
